name: Oreo Quick and Easy (July, 97 )
recipeInstructions:
1. Process 1 1/2 packages of Oreos into a powder form. Add melted margarine and process to combine.
2. Line a springform pan with the mixture, pressing the bottom to create a crust.
3. Process the remaining cookies into small pieces.
4. Place a layer of ice cream on top of the crust.
5. Spread the cookie pieces over the ice cream.
6. Make an Italian meringue using egg whites and sugar. Add vanilla. (Next time I'll add Grand Marnier.)
7. Stir in the cream to the meringue.
8. Cover the cake with this mixture and freeze.
9. Melt chocolate with 1 tablespoon honey and 1/2 cup milk.
10. Drizzle over the cake just before serving.
